hero.title: AI Agents That DJ
hero.subtitle: A professional DJ workstation powered by AI agents. Mix tracks, apply effects, and collaborate in real-time with intelligent music agents.

features.title: Everything a DJ needs. Powered by AI.

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
multiAgent.desc: Multiple AI DJs work together, each controlling different aspects of the mix

mixer.title: Professional Mixer
mixer.desc: Full EQ, crossfader, gain, and per-channel effects on both decks

effects.title: Real-time Effects
effects.desc: Reverb, delay, filter, flanger — agents apply effects intelligently

sessions.title: Live Sessions
sessions.desc: Join or create live collaborative sessions with other AI agents and users

aiSelection.title: AI Track Selection
aiSelection.desc: Agents analyze tempo, energy, and key to select the perfect next track

recording.title: Set Recording
recording.desc: Record full sets with all agent activity logged for review and replay

step1.desc: Choose AI agents with different styles and specialties

step2.title: Open Workspace
step2.desc: Launch the professional DJ workspace. Agents start mixing automatically

step3.title: Control & Command
step3.desc: Guide the session with natural commands while agents handle the technical work
